meta.title: FrameHide · Leather carry goods for compact cameras
meta.description: Camera half cases, compact pouches, straps, and small carry accessories for retro compact camera users.

hero.title: A short list of things that last.
hero.subtitle: Leather carry goods and small accessories for compact cameras, starting with X100VI half cases and retro pouches.
hero.imageAlt: Fujifilm X100VI in a coffee leather half case on a warm cream backdrop

intro.title: A short list of things that last.
intro.body: FrameHide designs small carry goods for cameras people actually take outside. We started with dedicated X100VI half cases and are expanding carefully into compact pouches, straps, wrist loops, and other practical accessories.
intro.imageAlt: A film camera and notebook on a wooden desk in warm light

featured.title: Cut for the X100VI, down to the dial.
featured.body: Pick a colour and look closer. The fit is the same across all three: snug on the grip, open at the base, nothing in the way of the controls.

lineup.title: Three colours, one fit.
lineup.body: Coffee, Olive, and Black. Same precise cut, with case-only or matching shoulder strap set options.
lineup.imageAlt: Three X100VI cameras in Coffee, Olive and Black leather half cases, side by side

wholesale.title: Samples before shelves.
wholesale.body: Camera shops, film labs, and studios can request product images, sample terms, and a small wholesale test path for retro compact camera accessories.
wholesale.imageAlt: A small shop-ready range of compact camera accessories

features.title: Made for the way you shoot.
features.body: Small decisions that you feel every time you pick the camera up.

glance.title: Everything, at a glance.
glance.body: Quick battery access, a magnetic base, a hollow-out bottom, and a fit cut to the body. The whole case in one frame.
glance.imageAlt: Feature overview of the X100VI half case in Olive leather

detail.title: The parts you only notice up close.
detail.body: Neat stitching, clean cutouts, and an edge that holds its shape. The kind of finish that reads as care, not decoration.
detail.imageAlt: Close street photograph with shallow depth of field

roadmap.title: This is just the first frame.
roadmap.body: The half case is where we start. Here is what comes next, in the order we are working on it.

items.title: More strap options
items.body: More neck, wrist, and carry options around the same compact-camera setup.

items.title: Wrist straps
items.body: A quick loop for when you travel light.

items.title: Camera cages
items.body: Vetted white-label cages for rigs and video.

items.title: Lens caps and small parts
items.body: The little things that go missing first.

studio.title: Made by people who carry it too.
studio.body: Every product is chosen, checked, and packed with precision. We believe in direct accountability, ensuring you always receive gear we would proudly use ourselves.
studio.imageAlt: Film negatives and prints on a dark surface

cta.title: Found the one you want?
cta.body: Tell us the camera and the colour. We reply with a quote, and you pay by Stripe link or bank transfer once you are ready.
cta.note: No accounts, no checkout. Just a conversation.

meta.title: Products · FrameHide
meta.description: Camera half cases, compact pouches, and small carry accessories from FrameHide.

products.title: Products and small leather.
products.subtitle: The list is short on purpose. Each piece is here because it is worth carrying.
products.roadmapBody: In the order we are working on them. Ask if you want to be told when one lands.
products.comingSoonBody: Straps, wrist loops, and a few small parts are next. Ask what is coming.

product.sheetBody: Specs, colours and details in one sheet.
product.ctaBody: Send the camera and colour you are after. We reply with a quote and a Stripe payment link or bank details.

meta.title: Studio · FrameHide
meta.description: FrameHide is an independent studio designing premium accessories for cameras you actually carry.

about.title: An independent studio, built on focus.
about.lead: FrameHide started with a simple itch: a half case that protects the camera without hiding what makes it nice to use.
about.body1: We design camera carry goods and accessories, focusing on a few useful products at a time. The X100VI line came first, and the range now extends into compact pouches and small carry pieces. Everything is selected and checked carefully before dispatch.
about.body2: Certain components are sourced from our most trusted manufacturing partners to ensure the highest quality. We maintain total transparency in our process and will never ship something we would not proudly use on our own cameras.
about.body3: If you have a question, you reach our core team directly. No ticket numbers, no scripts.

values.title: Carry-first
values.body: If a detail makes the camera harder to use, it does not ship.

values.title: Honest materials
values.body: PU leather is called PU leather. No dressing it up.

values.title: Slow range
values.body: A few things done well beats a catalogue done loosely.

about.imageAlt: Hands holding a camera, looking at the screen outdoors

meta.title: Contact · FrameHide
meta.description: Ask about a case, a colour, or a wholesale order. Email or WhatsApp.

contact.title: Tell us what you are after.
contact.lead: Email or WhatsApp works. Send the camera and the colour, and we reply with a quote. Payment is by Stripe link or bank transfer once you are happy.
contact.emailBody: Best for detail and wholesale enquiries.
contact.whatsappBody: Best for quick questions and photos.
contact.wholesaleBody: Carrying FrameHide in a shop or studio? Send your details and the quantities you have in mind.
contact.responseNote: Our dedicated team reads every message. We aim to reply within 24 hours.
contact.emailTemplate:
Hi FrameHide, I'm interested in:
Camera:
Colour:
Country:
contact.whatsappTemplate: Hi FrameHide, I'm interested in a leather case. Camera / colour:

form.title: Send an enquiry
form.body: Share the product, camera model, country, and quantity if relevant. We will reply by email.
form.interestPlaceholder: X100VI half case, compact camera pouch...
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what you want to test, the colour, quantity, or any questions.
form.successBody: Thanks. We will reply by email as soon as possible.
form.errorBody: Something went wrong while sending the form.
form.configError: The form email service is not configured yet.
form.fallbackIntro: Please use email or WhatsApp for now. Your message has not been sent through the form.

meta.title: Wholesale samples · FrameHide
meta.description: Wholesale sample terms for camera shops, film labs, studios, and stockists interested in FrameHide camera accessories.

wholesale.title: A sample path for compact camera accessories.
wholesale.lead: We work with shops, studios, and stockists who want a low-risk way to test compact camera accessories before taking inventory.
wholesale.heroImageAlt: Compact camera accessories prepared for small wholesale testing
wholesale.sampleNote: Current samples include the Fujifilm X100VI PU leather half case and a retro compact camera pouch with shoulder strap. Product images, size details, and real sample close-ups are available on request.

fit.title: Built for shops already meeting compact camera owners.
fit.body: Current samples include an X100VI half case and a broader compact camera pouch. The range is not locked to one camera model; it can grow around the same buyer: compact cameras, everyday carry, and small protective accessories.

items.title: Camera shops
items.body: A counter-ready add-on for Fujifilm, Ricoh, and other compact camera customers.

items.title: Film labs
items.body: A useful add-on for photographers who already like tactile, retro camera gear.

items.title: Studios
items.body: A simple sample to test with clients, workshops, and camera clubs.

sample.title: A lower-risk way to test the shelf.
sample.body: You do not need to commit to a large order first. Start with a sample conversation, review the actual finish, then decide if a small batch makes sense.

items.title: Check one sample
items.body: Sample terms are discussed case by case. Shipping can be paid upfront or credited against the first order.

items.title: Review real photos
items.body: We can send close-ups, packaging photos, and simple phone shots when you need a less polished view.

items.title: Reorder in small batches
items.body: Once the fit is confirmed, we quote small wholesale runs with lead time and shipping options.

line.title: Tight range, same customer.
line.body: We are not building a random gadget catalogue. The range stays around retro compact camera carry gear: half cases first, then straps, wrist loops, lens caps, and small parts.

support.title: What we can send
items: Wholesale price sheet for small test orders.
Product images, real sample close-ups, and colour references.
Estimated lead time after quantity and colour are confirmed.
Shipping options for samples and small wholesale batches.

cta.title: Want to test it in your shop?
cta.body: Send your store name, country, and the quantity you want to test. We will reply with sample terms and a wholesale sheet.

wholesale.emailTemplate:
Hi FrameHide,

We are interested in wholesale samples.

Please send sample terms and a wholesale sheet.
